Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: Let's try looking at the Global Map, Commander. You can either hit the Tab key or click on the Maximize button on the Tactical Display window to view the map in full screen. If you need to exit the map, hit Tab again or click the Minimize button at top right.
If you want to hide the Map or Tactical Display entirely, hit the X button on the Tactical Display, hit the M key, or click the Map icon on the bottom right of the screen.
